summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Interview Assistant. Backend APIs working well (94.4% success rate). Frontend basic flows functional but has session persistence issues affecting navigation.

minor_bugs.issue: Brute force protection returns 500 instead of 429 on 6th failed attempt

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence problems - users get logged out unexpectedly during navigation
Navigation to create-session page inconsistent - button clicks don't always work

integration_issues.issue: JWT cookie authentication not persisting properly across page navigation

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue in frontend - JWT cookies are not being maintained properly during navigation, causing users to be logged out unexpectedly. This affects the create session flow and other authenticated navigation.
